english: Fetch user profiles from the CRM API with OAuth and a 20 second timeout.
Write the daily sales summary to the analytics database as an upsert operation.
Transform the source CSV file into JSON and upload it to the data lake folder named 'ingest'.
Notify the on-call team via email if the error rate exceeds 5 percent.
Reprocess failed messages from the billing queue with up to 3 retries and log warnings.
Validate incoming webhook payloads against the JSON schema before processing.
Fetch product details from both partner APIs in parallel and merge the results.
Archive application logs older than 30 days to cold storage every night at 02:00 UTC.
